sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: P&G 2026 회계연도 2분기 유기적 매출은 전년과 동일하며, 핵심 주당순이익(EPS)은 1.88달러를 기록했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 2026 회계연도 2분기 유기적 매출 성장률은 0%로 전년 수준을 유지했으며, 가격 인상 효과(+1%)가 판매량 감소(-1%)를 상쇄했습니다.
핵심 주당순이익(Core EPS)은 1.88달러로 전년과 동일한 수준을 기록했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 전체 10개 제품 카테고리 중 7개에서 유기적 매출이 성장하거나 유지되었으며, 상위 50개 카테고리/국가 조합 중 25개에서 가치 점유율을 유지하거나 확대했습니다.
뷰티, 그루밍, 헬스케어, 패브릭 및 홈케어 등 주요 세그먼트 전반에서 관세 비용, 마케팅 투자 증가, 부정적인 제품 및 지리적 믹스 영향이 순이익에 반영되었습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 조정된 잉여현금흐름 생산성(Adjusted Free Cash Flow Productivity)은 88%를 기록했습니다.
통화 중립 기준 핵심 주당순이익(Currency-Neutral Core EPS)은 1.85달러로 전년 대비 2% 감소했습니다.
글로벌 시장 가치 점유율은 전년 대비 20포인트 하락했습니다.

watchItems.text: 관세 비용 및 마케팅 투자 증가가 향후 분기 수익성에 미칠 지속적인 영향과 판매량 회복 여부를 확인할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 q2fy2026earningsslidesv3.htm EX-99.1 q2fy2026earningsslidesv3 Q2 FY 2026 Results January 22, 2026 EARNINGS RELEASE BUSINESS RESULTS Q2 FY 2026 Second quarter results heavily impacted by base period dynamics and underlying market trends. Organic sales were in-line with prior year. Pricing +1% offset by volume -1%. 7 of 10 product categories grew or held organic sales for the quarter. Global aggregate value share is down 20 basis points, with 25 of our top 50 category/country combinations holding or growing share for the quarter. Core earnings per share were $1.88, in-line with the prior year. On a currency-neutral basis, core EPS was $1.85. Q2 FY 2026 RESULTS Q2 FY ’26 Organic Sales Growth +0% Organic Volume Growth -1% Core EPS Growth +0% Currency Neutral Core EPS Growth -2% Adjusted Free Cash Flow Productivity 88% Q2 FY 2026 RESULTS 2% 3% 1% 2% 2% 0%Q1 FY '25 Q2 FY '25 Q3 FY '2  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.88 = 1.88달러; $1.85 = 1.85달러; 20 basis points = 20포인트.

s • Topline: +3% volume, +2% pricing, -1% mix • Share: Global Skin Care value share decreased 0.7 points, Global Personal Care value share increased 0.4 points and Global Hair Care value share decreased 0.7 points versus year ago. • Net Earnings: Sales growth and productivity savings more than offset by marketing investment, tariff costs, increased commodities and negative geographic mix. Q2 FY 2026 RESULTS Beauty Segment 0% -2% -9% Organic Sales Organic Volume Net Earnings • Topline: +2% pricing, flat mix, -2% volume • Share: Global Grooming value share decreased 0.4 points versus year ago. • Net Earnings: Productivity savings and pricing more than offset by negative product mix, marketing investment and tariff costs. Q2 FY 2026 RESULTS Grooming Segment 3% -1% 2% Organic Sales Organic Volume Net Earnings Q2 FY 2026 RESULTS Health Care Segment • Topline: +2% mix, +1% pricing, -1% volume

• Share: Global Oral Care value share was flat and Global Personal Health Care value share increased 0.4 points versus year ago. • Net Earnings: Sales growth and productivity savings partially offset by negative geographic mix, increased marketing and tariff costs. 0% 0% -3% Organic Sales Organic Volume Net Earnings • Topline: +1% pricing, flat volume, -1% mix • Share: Global Fabric Care value share decreased 0.6 points and Global Home Care value share increased 0.3 points versus year ago. • Net Earnings: Productivity savings more than offset by product investment and tariff costs. Q2 FY 2026 RESULTS Fabric & Home Care Segment -4% -5% -9% Organic Sales Organic Volume Net Earnings • Topline: Flat pricing and mix, -5% volume • Share: Global Baby Care value share increased 0.4 points, Global Feminine Care value share decreased 0.2 points and Global Family Care share decreased 1.1 points. •
